text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Plan Characteristics Codebook │ October 2025 │ V 1.7 11 

CONDITION_CATEGORY_09 

LABEL: Special Needs Plan (SNP) — Condition Category 09 (End-Stage Renal Disease) 

DESCRIPTION: This variable identifies special needs plans (SNP) for end-stage renal disease Requiring Any Mode of 
Dialysis (Condition Category 09). 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: CMS (HPMS files) 

VALUES: N = Not a SNP for this Condition Category 
Y = SNP for
